textByHash.0b21ca08fba2436dec6a529cfce2385797032e2a: Back where you came from, of course!
textByHash.297515838d3cf0558acfc9ba02bcc13f8df68133: This is my home, mundane human! What do you have in your pockets? Something tasty?
textByHash.4cfe0ebdc0cac9623d5a998b099eaa26af5a4e94: The aetheric thread connecting you to your own plane leads back to the wheat field where you came from. Obviously. So you will always go back to where you came from! Don't you humans know anything?
textByHash.65dd294ce9aa7bec67455884638ec2192ffe253d: You want to know about the portal? It is for leaving this place, of course!
textByHash.756285ebae55252d32fbed346a72b5558965fde8: Then you have something that implings want.
textByHash.7883390f34b0db065a884797d5093a53702ca418: We want things you people want. They are tasty to us! The more you want them, the tastier they are!
textByHash.8482bb3dbfd1a63562a5f6f4161c9cb328984c6f: Ah, but do you have anything that want?
textByHash.b380fd7a0a67760be9ffb4b26739943688fb074a: Don't do that! That would be cruel. But chase us, yes! That is good. Implings are not easy to catch. Especially ones with really tasty food.
textByHash.b96217e59d82230d25ebf613d7d015d01bd77452: That doesn't look solved to me.
